attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.COUNTRY_CODE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BRANCH_ID, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BANK_ID, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM, TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM_HASH1 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM_HASH2 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.MASKED_BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BA_MASK_SETTING, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BA_UNMASK_LENGTH, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.IBAN, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.IBAN_HASH1, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.IBAN_HASH2, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.MASKED_IBAN, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.CHECK_DIGITS, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ACCOUNT_CLASSIFICATION, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ACCOUNT_SUFFIX, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.AGENCY_LOCATION_CODE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.PAYMENT_FACTOR_FLAG, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.FOREIGN_PAYMENT_USE_FLAG, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.EXCHANGE_RATE_AGREEMENT_NUM, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.EXCHANGE_RATE_AGREEMENT_TYPE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.EXCHANGE_RATE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.HEDGING_CONTRACT_REFERENCE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.SECONDARY_ACCOUNT_REFERENCE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BA_NUM_SEC_SEGMENT_ID, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ENCRYPTED, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.IBAN_SEC_SEGMENT_ID, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.START_DATE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.END_DATE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME_ALT, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.SHORT_ACCT_NAME, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM_ELECTRONIC, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BA_NUM_ELEC_SEC_SEGMENT_ID, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.SALT_VERSION, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.CONTACT_NAME, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.CONTACT_PHONE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.CONTACT_FAX, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.CONTACT_EMAIL, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS,
 (
 select EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS
 minus
 select EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID = STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS)
